flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Northwest Louisiana Technical Community College rose 406% between 2006 and 2009 (6.8% → 34.5%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Northwest Louisiana Technical Community College rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 (65.6% → 78.7%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Northwest Louisiana Technical Community College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (779 → 866).
